## Signal

What delivery signal should be recorded?

## Why It Helps

How does this help a buyer or supplier verify useful compute delivery?

## Public-Safety Check

- [ ] No private keys, API keys, credentials, or webhook secrets
- [ ] No customer names, contracts, invoices, or private pricing
- [ ] No production wallet, exchange, settlement, liquidity, or custody logic
- [ ] No token reward, ROI, listing, futures, or guaranteed matching claim
